name: intl-expansion
description: > International market expansion strategy for scaling companies. Covers market selection scoring, entry mode evaluation, localization requirements, regulatory compliance by region, go-to-market adaptation, team structure decisions, and launch planning. Use when expanding to new countries, evaluating international markets, planning localization, building regional teams, assessing regulatory requirements, or when user mentions international expansion, market entry, localization, regional strategy,
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一套面向成长期公司的海外扩张方法论，帮你评估目标市场、选择进入方式、规划本地化和合规要点，并搭建区域团队和上市节奏，适合准备出海或落地新国家时参考。
